name: @chart-review/mcp-server-ner-stdio
description: Standalone subprocess MCP server for chart_review_ner — speaks JSON-RPC over stdio via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk. Spawned by the agent runtime when the active provider can't host the in-process Anthropic-SDK server (Codex, etc.). Same 7 NER handlers as the in-process adapter; only transport differs.
